creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #7)
> This is running on a core i5 which smokes an athlon.  strange...

This code is probably too old to know about an i5, so it ends up trying a bunch more options to optimize the algorithms.

Hmn, this is 3.8.4 and the latest release is 3.10.2.  Lots of changes in the meantime;
<http://sourceforge.net/projects/math-atlas/files/Stable/3.10.2/ChangeLog/download>
